sources.notes: ChatGPT returned reject_rework because no exact public Golden Jackrabbit geometry source was found and all downstream July gates remain unresolved. This is retained as historical audit context; Codex later found app-library Bikepacking.com GPX provenance and reclassified the route to Plan Ready only.

route.sourceNote: Planning package geometry resolved from bikepacking_planner/data/public_gpx/golden-jackrabbit-loop.gpx. Official/public GPX imported in the app route library. Official/public GPX imported from https://bikepacking.com/routes/golden-jackrabbit-loop/ ; GPX: https://bikepacking.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Golden-Jackrabbit-Loop-Bikepacking-Route-v2.gpx Local copy: bikepacking_planner/data/public_gpx/golden-jackrabbit-loop.gpx. Plan Ready geometry is present, but Codex still needs route-mile QA before any gate confirmation.
route.description: Post-audit correction on 2026-07-04: this route is retained as Plan Ready, not reject_rework, because the app route library already has an official/public Bikepacking.com GPX for Golden Jackrabbit Loop. It is still not gate_confirmed for July 10-13, 2026: the current package lacks a complete route-mile legal/current-closure pass, exact overnight availability, measured water/food gaps, bailout/parking/transit proof, same-week fire/smoke/AQI/weather/heat checks, and Codex export QA.
